scenario.title: TC_003_UOP_001 UOP login
scenario.step: When [Input] I login as 'alaa.abdelbagi' with password 'Aa1'

And [Input] I click on 'User Name Header Button'org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //*[@id="ctl00_RadMenu1"]/ul/li[1]/a' (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
And [Input] I click on 'Profile Header Button'
And [Assertion] Verify 'User Name Value' have attribute 'value' with 'alaa.abdelbagi' value
scenario.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //*[@id="ctl00_RadMenu1"]/ul/li[1]/a' (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:230) at com.automation.pages.AbstractPage.getElementWithWait(AbstractPage.java:43) at com.automation.pages.CannedPage.click(CannedPage.java:408) at com.automation.steps.CannedSteps.click(CannedSteps.java:386) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.jbehave.core.steps.StepCreator$ParametrisedStep.perform(StepCreator.java:599) at org.jbehave.core.embedder.PerformableTree$FineSoFar.run(PerformableTree.java:340) ...
